title: ElementData
description: Schema for a single element in the Remaster Engine. v1.0.0: created per DEC-001/006/008 (7 elements: 6 color + neutral). Per §7.4 of the design document.

id.description: Element identifier. 7 elements per DEC-006: 6 color + 'neutral' (the 7th, for physical/non-elemental abilities and Chrono Cross specials).

display_name.description: Display name shown in UI. e.g., 'White', 'Red', 'Neutral'.

color_hex.description: Hex color for UI rendering. e.g., '#FFFFFF' for white, '#FF0000' for red, '#808080' for neutral.

base_damage_type.description: How the element's damage is computed. magic = scales with mag stat. physical = scales with atk stat. true = ignores defense.

resistances.description: Resistance map: from this element's attacks to each target element. Per DEC-001, default is mirrored pairs: strong vs 2 = 0.5 multiplier, weak vs 2 = 2.0 multiplier, neutral vs 2 (incl. self) = 1.0. Neutral element has all 1.0 (no special interaction).
